ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or territory */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or territory (for cases where the name differs) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "guns_per_100_inhabitants" REAL /* Number of firearms per 100 inhabitants */,
  "number_of_mass_shootings" INTEGER /* Number of mass shootings */,
  "number_of_homicides_by_firearm" INTEGER /* Number of homicides by firearm */,
  "average_firearms_per_100_people" REAL /* Average number of firearms per 100 people */,
  "average_total_all_civilian_firearms" REAL /* Average total number of all civilian firearms */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_statistics_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population */,
  "urban_population" TEXT /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" TEXT /* Rural population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_shootings" (
  "shooting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mass shooting event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "number_of_victims" INTEGER /* Number of victims */,
  "number_of_injured" INTEGER /* Number of injured */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used */,
  "shooter_info" TEXT /* Information about the shooter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shooting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mass_shootings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., country, statistic, shooting) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government report, international database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_laws" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm law */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "law_type" TEXT /* Type of the firearm law (e.g., licensing, registration) */,
  "law_description" TEXT /* Description of the firearm law */,
  "law_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the law became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearm_laws_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
